name: io.github.onetrueclaude-creator/vault-health-mcp
description: Obsidian vault structural health: broken links, orphans, missing frontmatter, safe auto-repair.

packageArguments.name: --vault
packageArguments.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory. Optional — can also be set at runtime via the configure_vault tool.

environmentVariables.name: VAULT_HEALTH_LICENSE
environmentVariables.description: Pro license JWT (optional). Unlocks the repair_vault auto-fix tool. See the README for details.
